mainMenu.description:
💎 This is the best anti-scam project on the TG market
 Developer: @TeM4ik20

ℹ️ What you can do in bot’s private chat:
╟ Send @username
╟ Forward a user’s message
╟ Click “Select user”

💪 What the bot will send in response:
╟ User ID
╟ Scam database status
╟ Verified performers database status
╟ TOP guarantors database status

💬 Add the bot to a chat:
╟ Remove inadequate users
╟ Block scammers 🔥

❓ Got a scam complaint?
👉 Click “Submit a complaint”

complaint.instructions:
📝 To file a complaint against a scammer:

1️⃣ Send the user’s @username
2️⃣ Or forward a message from this user
3️⃣ Or click the "Select user" button below
complaint.selectUser:
👤 Select a user to check:

Send @username or forward a message from the user you want to check.
complaint.fullInstructions: ⚡️ Quick complaint submission. ℹ️ To submit a scam complaint, you must first collect the following data: 1. Scammer's username or Telegram ID. 2. Description of the situation [ Limit: 500 characters ] 3. Photo / Video proof [ from 2 to 10 media files ] ‼️ Submitting a complaint that doesn’t match the form or contains spam or malicious intent may result in a complaint ban, bot block, or inclusion in the suspicious users database. 🔸 By clicking “Fill out the form”, you automatically agree to the above rules.

form.step1:
⚡️ Quick complaint submission.

1️⃣ Send the bot the scammer’s username or Telegram ID.

Formats:
• @username
• 1234567890

Or just forward a message from the scammer.

💡 The user’s ID will be detected automatically.
form.step2:
⚡️ Quick complaint submission.

 User: {userInfo}

 2️⃣ Add twin accounts (alternative scammer accounts)

If none, click “Skip twins”.
form.step3:
⚡️ Quick complaint submission.

3️⃣ Send a description of the scam (Limit: 500 characters)
form.step4:
⚡️ Quick complaint submission.

4️⃣ Send photo/video proof of the scam.

🖼 Media received: {count} / 10

💡 You can send evidence as a media group or one by one.
form.step1SelectUser:
⚡️ Quick complaint submission.

1 – Send the bot the scammer’s Telegram ID in digits, forward a message, or choose a chat with the scammer using the appeared button
form.userSelected:
✅ User selected:

ID: {userId}

⚡️ Quick complaint submission.

2 – Send a description of the scam (Limit: 500 characters)
form.success: ✅ Your complaint ({complaintId}) has been sent to moderators. We’ll notify you of the results.
form.addedTwin:
✅ Twin(s) added!

📋 Current twins:
{twinsList}

Send more or click “Skip twins”.

errors.invalidInput: ❗️ Please send a valid username or forward a message from the scammer.
errors.tooManyMedia: ❗️ You can send up to 10 media files.
errors.minMedia: ❗️ You must send at least 1 media file.
errors.invalidUsernameOrId: ❗️ Please send a valid username or Telegram ID.
errors.invalidUsername: ❗️ Invalid username format. Username must start with a letter and contain 5–32 characters (letters, numbers, underscores).

appeal.fullInstructions: ⚡️ Quick appeal submission. ℹ️ To submit an appeal, you must first collect the following data: 1. Username or Telegram ID. 2. Description of the situation [ Limit: 500 characters ] 3. Photo / Video proof [ from 2 to 10 media files ] ‼️ Submitting an appeal that doesn’t match the form or contains spam may result in a submission ban, bot block, or inclusion in the suspicious users database. 🔸 By clicking “Fill out the form”, you automatically agree to the above rules.

form.step1:
⚡️ Quick appeal submission.

1 – Send the bot the user’s username or forward their message.
form.step2:
⚡️ Quick appeal submission.

2 – Send a description of the situation (Limit: 500 characters)
form.step3:
⚡️ Quick appeal submission.

3 – Send photo / video proof.

🖼 Media received: {count} / 10

💡 You can send evidence as a media group or individually.
form.step1SelectUser:
⚡️ Quick appeal submission.

1 – Send the user’s Telegram ID in digits, forward their message, or select chat using the button.
form.userSelected:
✅ User selected:

ID: {userId}

⚡️ Quick appeal submission.

2 – Send a description of the situation (Limit: 500 characters)
form.success: ✅ Appeal successfully submitted! Thank you for your vigilance.

errors.invalidInput: ❗️ Please send a valid username or forward a message from the user.
errors.tooManyMedia: ❗️ You can send up to 10 media files.
errors.minMedia: ❗️ You must send at least 1 media file.
errors.invalidUsernameOrId: ❗️ Please send a valid username or Telegram ID.
errors.invalidUsername: ❗️ Invalid username format. Username must start with a letter and contain 5–32 characters (letters, numbers, underscores).

admin.adminRemoved: User @{username} is now a regular user.

garant.notFound:
❌ The guarantors list is empty.

No available guarantors at the moment.
garant.footer:
💡 **How to work with guarantors:**

• Always verify a guarantor via /garants
• Use only verified guarantors
• Contact the administration if in doubt

🔗 **Useful links:**
╟ [Catalog](https://t.me/nftcatalog)
╟ [Tags](https://t.me/svdteg)
╟ [Add bot to group](https://t.me/svdbasebot?startgroup=true)
garant.defaultDescription: Verified guarantor with a positive reputation
